data.body: `src/stores/terminal-store.ts:11-14` defines `agentName`, `agentModel`, `agentVersion`, `agentCommand` as separate persisted fields on `ActiveTerminal`. These are duplicate runtime state that can drift from the lease — the user has reported them being inconsistent for months. Replace with a `knotsLeaseId` reference plus a hook that resolves agent identity from the lease (or from the bound knot’s most recent step) on demand. See parent foolery-2e97 rule 5.
data.title: Replace terminal-store raw agent fields with lease-id resolver
